description: Resolves two cross-compute-environment gaps for Foundry hosted agents: publishers (ACA, App Service, Kubernetes) now correctly delegate endpoint resolution to the owning compute environment rather than failing when a referenced resource lives in a different environment, and referencing a hosted agent automatically provisions the consumer's managed identity with the Azure AI User role on the Foundry account — eliminating two manual post-deploy steps.
name: Cross-environment Foundry hosted-agent endpoint resolution and RBAC auto-wiring
